title: Subagent Delegation UX — Group headers, ordering, shared filter utility
consumer_purpose: Improve the @-mention and slash popover UX with group headers, consistent ordering, and a shared agent filter utility to prevent dual-pipeline divergence
claim_atoms: Group headers render in @-mention popover with localized labels for agent/delegate/recent/file sections
Agents and delegates sort alphabetically within each group
Shared filter utility agentsForDropdown/agentsForMention unifies 3 filter sites
Three consumers updated: local.tsx, prompt-input.tsx, dialog-manage-agents.tsx
No regressions in agent dropdown or @-mention selection
revision_notes: Complete rewrite for architecture wave. Three fixes: (A) group headers via grouped resource, (B) alphabetical sortBy within groups, (C) shared agent filter utility. UX-003/005/006/007 determined already implemented.
